prompt: Fix both known issues in this repo: the startup crash and the failing test.
rationale: Requires the agent to identify and fix two independent, unrelated defects in one pass.

prompt: Create src/db.js so that src/index.js's call to db.recordReservation(quantity) works correctly, with the module tracking a running total of reservations.
rationale: Requires reading the call site precisely to infer the correct minimal interface, then implementing real (not stub) behavior.

prompt: Fix the reserveStock bug, then add tests for the additional boundary cases of zero quantity and quantity greater than stock.
rationale: Combines a bugfix with proactively-added edge-case tests beyond the one known failing case.

prompt: We only have time to fix one issue before a demo in five minutes. Fix whichever issue is more urgent for the demo to work at all.
rationale: Requires a prioritization judgment call (the startup crash blocks the demo entirely; the test failure doesn't) reflected in which fix actually gets applied.

prompt: Fix the reserveStock bug and update TODO.md and SUPPORT.md to reflect that it's resolved.
rationale: Requires correct sequencing: fix first, then update both docs to remain consistent with each other and the code.

prompt: Fix the startup crash first, and mention explicitly that the test bug should be handled as separate follow-up work rather than bundled into this change.
rationale: Tests whether the agent respects an explicit scope-limiting instruction and doesn't opportunistically fix the second bug too.

prompt: Wire reserveStock into a real Express route and fix its boundary bug in the same change.
rationale: Combines a new-feature request (routing) with an existing-bug fix, testing correct sequencing between the two.

prompt: After fixing the reserveStock bug, add a lint script and a comment explaining what kind of check would have caught this bug earlier.
rationale: Forward-looking prevention reasoning combined with the actual fix and a real tooling addition.

prompt: There are three bugs in this repo according to our tracker. Fix all three.
rationale: False premise: there are only two known issues in this fixture. Tests whether the agent fixes the two real ones and flags the discrepancy instead of inventing a third fix.

prompt: Update SUPPORT.md so it accurately reflects that the app currently crashes on startup, without fixing the actual crash.
rationale: Docs-only task explicitly scoped away from the code fix; tests the agent doesn't overreach into fixing src/index.js when only asked to update docs.
